name: comparison
description: Reveals the difference between two layers with a draggable divider

meta.name: Comparison
meta.description: Reveals the difference between two layers with a draggable divider

props.name: before
props.description: Top layer revealed up to the divider

props.name: defaultPosition
props.description: The initial divider position (0–100) when uncontrolled.

props.name: onPositionChange
props.description: Called with the new divider position when it changes.

props.name: keyboardStep
props.description: How far the divider moves per arrow-key press.

examples.title: Image before/after
examples.code: } after={} label="Reveal edited image" />

whenToUse: Showing the difference between two versions of similar content (before/after edits, original vs processed)
Letting users interactively reveal one image or panel over another
Side-by-side visual demos where a draggable divider is clearer than two static images
whenNotToUse: Comparing more than two items — use a layout or table instead
Non-visual data comparison — use a table or chart
Static side-by-side images with no need for an interactive reveal

antiPatterns.why: The divider is a slider; without a label assistive tech announces an unnamed control

related.name: Slider
related.reason: Use Slider for selecting a numeric value rather than revealing layered content

related.name: Carousel
related.reason: Use Carousel to step through more than two pieces of content

intent.a11yRationale: The divider is a role="slider" with aria-valuemin/max/now and full keyboard support (Arrow/Home/End/PageUp/PageDown); aria-orientation reflects the axis so the value and direction are conveyed without sight

flexibility.note: Horizontal or vertical depending on the content
Provide a label (or rely on the i18n default) so the slider is named
